commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 02 Jul

NYSE dominates liquidity rankings with superior performance across all metrics: ILLIQ of 0.0013 and roll spread of 1.35% significantly outpace competitors. Nasdaq 100 follows closely, though ILLIQ doubles to 0.0024. LSE substantially lags at rank four, with ILLIQ reaching 0.1632—over 125 times higher than NYSE—indicating considerably thinner order books. Despite similar composite rankings, Euronext and SIX Swiss exhibit marked ILLIQ divergence (0.0204 vs. 0.0215), underscoring depth variations in mid-cap liquidity pools.
